name: Elbmesh Hidden External Call
summary: An external HTTP/provider call is made without a declared External Operation, idempotency key, and Operation Journal visibility.

rules: External calls require declared External Operations.
checks: Search changed handler, projection, replay, and adapter code for direct HTTP/provider calls.
Verify Action manifest entries include required external_operation_types.
antiPatterns: HTTP call inside Projection code for v1 live enrichment.
Domain handler directly imports Restate or a provider client instead of using framework operation APIs.

blocks.markdown: Hidden external calls break retry safety and explainability. If a provider succeeds but Resource Event append fails, the framework cannot know whether retrying will duplicate the side effect.

blocks.description: External operations are first-class execution metadata.
Debt D4 flags arbitrary async handlers performing non-durable side effects.
